ipxact:component.ipxact:name: weft_axi_xbar_2x2
ipxact:component.ipxact:description: Weft AXI4 crossbar, concrete 2x2 configuration (top module weft_axi_xbar_flat). Exposes two subordinate interfaces (s0_axi/s1_axi, id=4) and two manager interfaces (m0_axi/m1_axi, id=5), all bound to weft:bus:axi4.rtl. Address map: sub0=[0x0,0x1000), sub1=[0x1000,0x2000); decode misses return DECERR. The generic parameterizable component is weft:axi:weft_axi_xbar:0.1.0. Depends on weft:axi:weft_axi_common and weft:common.
